# השתלות שיער בתאילנד — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A hair transplant clinic or medical tourism service based in Thailand, offering hair restoration procedures to clients likely traveling from abroad for affordable, high-quality treatments. The business operates in the medical tourism space, combining professional healthcare services with the appeal of Thailand as a destination.

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About השתלות שיער בתאילנד
A hair transplant clinic or medical tourism service based in Thailand, offering hair restoration procedures to clients likely traveling from abroad for affordable, high-quality treatments. The business operates in the medical tourism space, combining professional healthcare services with the appeal of Thailand as a destination.

## Services/Products
- השתלות שיער

## Target Audience
- צעירים מקצועיים
- תיירי בריאות יוקרתיים
- גברים עם נשירת שיער

## Industry
Medical Tourism / Hair Transplant
